cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Personal Loyalty Under Institutional Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack's relationship with Sam shifts from confident camaraderie to emotional rupture under institutional strain, beginning with performative superiority and ending in mutual betrayal during interrogation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: outwardly confident, asserting career superiority over Sam
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally broken, accusing Sam of betrayal before death
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: mutual fear and misunderstanding between Jack and Sam, with no resolution before Jack's death

cross_scene_arcs.title: Complicity and Bureaucratic Subversion
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack repeatedly violates protocol to assist Sam, enabling unauthorized access to dossiers and detainee records, but ultimately distances himself as institutional consequences escalate.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: willing to bypass protocol for personal loyalty
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: prioritizing institutional duty over personal alliance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: conflict between personal allegiance and adherence to bureaucratic procedure

cross_scene_arcs.title: Performance of Authority and Inner Instability
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack maintains a public image of competence and control, from deflecting personal scrutiny to managing social errors for superiors, but this facade collapses under crisis, revealing anxiety and emotional instability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: visibly distressed and emotionally unmoored during interrogation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: discrepancy between his enthusiastic claims of success and his anxious delivery

cross_scene_arcs.title: Posthumous Authority and Narrative Ambiguity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack reappears in a surreal epilogue as a spectral authority figure, confirming Sam's escape and maintaining institutional oversight beyond death, blurring the line between reality and delusion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: present as a surviving observer in a dreamlike revision
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: nature of reality in the final sequence

cross_scene_arcs.title: Resistance Through Bureaucratic Confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jill attempts to navigate and challenge the bureaucratic system to correct a wrongful arrest, escalates to direct confrontation when blocked, and ultimately exposes the system's absurdity by revealing the 'bomb' as mere bribes.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jill seeks help through official channels to report a wrongful arrest.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jill publicly reveals the parcel as non-threatening and is assaulted while aiding victims, marking her full break from institutional compliance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her attempt to correct bureaucratic error remains unresolved, and she faces physical retaliation for defiance.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Flight and Survival as a Fugitive
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jill transitions from a private citizen under surveillance to an active fugitive, evading capture through covert movements, leading a dangerous escape, and ultimately establishing a hidden off-grid life.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jill flees her flat with belongings under urgent circumstances.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jill resides in a concealed, overgrown truck-house in a remote valley, living self-sufficiently.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The safety and permanence of her hidden refuge remain uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Partnership with Sam Lowry
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jill's relationship with Sam evolves from absence and pursuit to cautious cooperation, reconnection under duress, emotional reaffirmation, and active collaboration in escape.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jill is unaware of Sam's arrival as she flees her flat.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jill and Sam are united, with Jill rescuing and transporting Sam in a shared act of resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Their long-term safety and ability to sustain their relationship under systemic threat remain uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Systemic Violence and Injustice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jill repeatedly encounters state violence and intrusion, from a uniformed man in her bathroom to witnessing a raid and ultimately being assaulted while helping bombing victims, marking her trajectory from victim to resister.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jill experiences a violation of privacy by a man in uniform in her bathroom.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jill is physically attacked by a security guard while aiding the injured, solidifying her opposition to state violence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The systemic use of force against civilians remains unchecked, and Jill remains at risk.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Dream to Reality: Pursuit of the Idealized Woman
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sam's pursuit of the girl from his dreams gradually merges with his real-world encounter with Jill, evolving from fantasy into a desperate attempt at connection, only to collapse with her death and his retreat into delusion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sam idealizes the girl in his dream as a figure to be rescued.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sam, informed of Jill's death, retreats into a catatonic state, mentally escaping into a fantasy world.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Jill truly embodied the dream girl or was merely a projection of Sam's desire remains ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Resistance and Capture: Rebellion Against the System
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sam resists institutional control through rejection of promotion, unauthorized access, and physical evasion, culminating in his capture and processing as a traitor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sam publicly rejects a promotion he believes was imposed by his mother and the system.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sam is labeled a traitor, arrested, and placed in state custody.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Sam's ability to resist or influence the system is extinguished by his physical and psychological containment.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bureaucratic Ensnarement and Loss of Agency
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sam's attempts to navigate or manipulate the bureaucratic system result in unintended consequences, including forced promotion, illegal access, flight, and eventual immobilization.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sam is transferred to Information Retrieval despite rejecting the promotion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sam is physically restrained and declared mentally unresponsive in custody.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The system continues to operate without accountability, rendering individual agency meaningless.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Desperation in Flight with Jill
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sam's goal to find and escape with Jill drives increasingly reckless actions, from bureaucratic manipulation to physical flight, but deteriorates due to misjudgment, inexperience, and external pressure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sam seeks access to Jill's dossier to locate her.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sam is captured while attempting to flee with Jill, who is later reported dead.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Jill could have been saved or if their escape was ever viable remains unknown.
